englishDefinitions: An American actress best known for her role on the television series Baywatch.
A celebrity name that may appear as a pop-culture reference, especially in conversations about 1990s television.
persianTranslation: بازیگر آمریکایی معروف به خاطر سریال بی‌واچ
examples: Yasmine Bleeth became famous through her role on Baywatch.
The article mentioned Yasmine Bleeth as a 1990s television star.
He recognized the name Yasmine Bleeth from old TV shows.
